description:
Gateway for connecting WSJT-* and FLRig to Wavelog


WavelogGate 1.2.0
Changelog:
- Notification if there's a new Version with link to Download-Page
- Profile-Switcher for more than 2 Profiles
- Auto-Quit "old Version" when launching the Gate a 2nd time (updates, accidently, etc.) - eliminates the bug which occured on double-start
- bug fixed, where Test stayed "green" when profile was switched
under the hood:
- Code-Cleanup
- More specific builder, which builds in the repo where the Action is triggered (Pipeline)
